zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bagot於大約1354年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比時，他的父親Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield21歲，母親Elizabeth Blithfield25歲。他於1388年之前與Beatrice Mallory在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bagot于大约1354年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield21岁，母亲Elizabeth Blithfield25岁。他于1388年之前与Beatrice Mallory在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.
Diogo Silves discovers the Azores Islands.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.
The marriage of Prince Ferdinand of Aragon and Princess Isabella of Castille.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bagot was born about 1354, in Brooksby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Blithfield, was 25. He married Beatrice Mallory before 1388, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

Il a épousé Beatrice Mallory avant 1388, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Ilenterré à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bagotが約1354年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルークスビーで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfieldは21歳，母Elizabeth Blithfieldは25歳であった。1388年以前にイギリスイギリスでBeatrice Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bagot(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 브룩스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Blithfield(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1388년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Beatrice Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.
